title: BlastEm Evidence Session Manifest
description: Per-session manifest written alongside evidence artifacts in out/evidence/blastem/. Records exact conditions of a capture session for reproducibility auditing.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for this capture session (timestamp-based)

session_started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the session began

session_completed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the session ended, null if not completed

emulator_version.description: BlastEm version string if detectable, null otherwise

sandbox_root.description: Absolute path to the isolated sandbox directory used for this session

capture_mode.description: canonical=full evidence bundle, minimal=screenshot only, debug=all plus extra diagnostics

boot_timeout_ms.description: Maximum milliseconds allowed for BlastEm boot and window readiness

artifacts.description: Map of artifact type to its relative path within the evidence directory

process_id.description: OS process ID of the BlastEm instance

exit_code.description: Exit code of the BlastEm process, null if still running or killed

close_mode.description: Which shutdown escalation level was used

errors.description: List of non-fatal errors encountered during the session
